prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约18762→19925→17633→21717→24588名，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约6955名；2025年基准位次约24588名，为近5年最低（位次数字最大）；该校在广东物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为10、10、9、15、11人，2026年大幅扩招至21人，较2025年增加10人（+91%），为近年最大扩幅，显著缓解竞争压力，对位次有下拉作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第65名，近年排名在59–72之间波动，整体稳定，属于中上水平211；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及拟录取研究生不当言论事件；抖音热度排名第57（较热），综合热度约55万，关注度中等偏上；近5年未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科5个：环境科学与工程A、土木工程A-、光学工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程A-，其中环境科学与工程为A级，与招生专业中的环境科学与工程类直接对应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招91%（远超考生增幅3.59%）、学校声誉偏负面等因素，扩招对位次的下拉作用占主导，预计2026年最低位次较2025年进一步后移；预测最低位次约37800名，区间37300–38300名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（实验班）
- 自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 量子信息科学
- 机械类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 环境科学与工程类（含环境工程、环境科学）
- 生物医学工程。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年北京工业大学在广东物理类大幅扩招至21人，预测位次区间37300–38300名。位次在区间下限（37300名）以内可重点冲刺一档计算机科学与技术（实验班）和自动化专业；位次在区间中段（约37800名）建议以二档数学类、量子信息科学、机械类为主；位次在区间上限（38300名）附近或以外，建议以三档环境科学与工程类、生物医学工程保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 18762 → 19925 → 17633 → 21717 → 24588, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6955 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 24588, the lowest in the past 5 years (largest ranking number); the enrollment plan for this university in Guangdong Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 10, 10, 9, 15, 11 respectively, and in 2026 it will significantly expand to 21, an increase of 10 students (+91%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly alleviating competition pressure and exerting a downward pull on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 65th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, fluctuating between 59 and 72 in recent years, overall stable, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving an incident of inappropriate remarks by a prospective graduate student; Douyin popularity ranking is 57th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, indicating medium-high attention; no obvious admission gaps in the past 5 years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 5 disciplines rated A- or above: Environmental Science and Engineering A, Civil Engineering A-, Optical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, among which Environmental Science and Engineering is rated A, directly corresponding to the Environmental Science and Engineering category in the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province is about 440,208 in 2025 and about 456,000 in 2026, an increase of about 15,792 (+3.59%), with slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of 91% in 2026 (far exceeding the 3.59% increase in examinees), and the somewhat negative university reputation, the downward pull of expansion on rankings dominates; it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will further shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 37,800, with a range of 37,300–38,300.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology (Experimental Class)
- Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Quantum Information Science
- Mechanical.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science)
- Biomedical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Beijing University of Technology significantly expands enrollment in Guangdong Physics Category to 21 students, with a predicted ranking range of 37,300–38,300. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit (37,300) or better can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Computer Science and Technology (Experimental Class) and Automation majors; those with rankings in the middle range (about 37,800) are advised to primarily consider Tier 2 Mathematics, Quantum Information Science, and Mechanical majors; those with rankings near or above the upper limit (38,300) are advised to use Tier 3 Environmental Science and Engineering and Biomedical Engineering as safety options.
